feedItems.description: allocated £201.4m to Children's Social Care (≈£239 per resident)
allocated £56.4m to Roads & Transport (≈£67 per resident)
allocated £389.9m to Adult Social Care (≈£463 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £85 (5.0%) to £1801
